content: [Task Assignment] T-ECOMMERCE-063: Execute routine: Track order status for customer experience: monitor orders from placement through Pictorem fulfillment to delivery; flag delayed orders within 24 hours
[Task Assignment] T-LEAD-GEN-040: Execute routine: Log and report duplicate rates by source to identify lowest-quality prospecting channels
[Task Assignment] T-SALES-RESEARCH-040: Execute routine: Log all research sources and confidence levels in each brief section for auditability and quality tracking
